subject: chore(scheduling): address cold-audit drift / extras
body:
Follow-up cleanup from a fresh-eyes audit pass on the branch:

- docs/HISTORY.md: corrected the original feature-commit entry that
  still claimed "cancel = hard delete" to accurately reflect the shipped
  soft-cancel architecture (with pointer to the hardening entry).

- docs/DATABASE.md: added the missing `scheduled_messages` schema
  section (every other table had one) — columns, constraints, indexes,
  RLS summary, related functions, cron jobs, and realtime publication.

- CLAUDE.md: Project Structure now lists `DateTimePicker.native.tsx`
  alongside `DateTimePicker.tsx` so the platform-split is visible.

- services/scheduledMessages.ts: removed two dead exports that had no
  callers — `EDIT_CUTOFF_MS` (made redundant when updateScheduledMessage
  dropped its pre-fetch TOCTOU pattern) and `countPendingScheduled` (the
  hook already exposes pendingCount from all[].filter).

- components/ScheduledMessagesModal.tsx: trim `editing.content` when
  passing it as `contentPreview` to the reschedule modal, matching what
  ComposeBar does on the original schedule flow.

No functional change; no new type errors.

Tags: scheduling, docs, cleanup, code-quality
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: message-scheduling
Semver: patch
title: address cold-audit drift / extras
